chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-775 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case 15-06-2023 Mr. Sadaruddin Lashari, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, Assistant A.G-Sindh. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Counsel for the petitioner has been unable to satisfy us as to how this petition is maintainable keeping in view prayer clause (a), which he is pressing. Petition stands dismissed as being not maintainable. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
